signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 CPI: Annual Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 CPI: Annual Inflation at 2.2% YoY (up from 2.0%, below 2.3-2.4% consensus)** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2]

South Korea's Statistics Korea confirmed March 2026 consumer price inflation rose to **2.2% year-on-year**, driven by oil prices amid Middle East tensions but tempered by government fuel caps and vouchers; monthly rise was 0.3% (below 0.6% expected), core inflation dipp

signals.headline: Goldman Sachs Submits Bitcoin ETF Filing | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Goldman Sachs Submits Bitcoin ETF Filing | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Goldman Sachs has filed for a Bitcoin-focused ETF using options strategies on spot Bitcoin ETFs, targeting income in stable markets; this institutional move, reported April 16, 2026, aligns with Bitcoin's price rise to ~$75,700 (+1.23-1.43%) and recent surge past $74K on April 14 amid ETF inflows.[1][4]
